brunswick.neighborhoods: Downtown, Bowdoin College area, Maquoit Bay
brunswick.meetingHighlights: College-town meetings near Bowdoin; Midcoast recovery hub; welcoming small-town atmosphere.
brunswick.transitInfo: Amtrak Downeaster service; Portland Jetport (PWM) nearby; US Route 1 access.

portland.neighborhoods: Old Port, Arts District, East End, West End, Back Cove, Deering Center, Munjoy Hill
portland.meetingHighlights: Maine's largest recovery community with diverse Old Port meetings; strong young people presence; active year-round.
portland.transitInfo: Metro bus service; Portland Jetport (PWM); Amtrak Downeaster to Boston.

bangor.neighborhoods: Downtown Bangor, West Side, East Side, Bangor Waterfront
bangor.meetingHighlights: Central Maine recovery hub serving Northern and Eastern regions; active downtown meetings; strong service tradition.
bangor.transitInfo: Community Connector bus service; Bangor International Airport (BGR); I-95 corridor.

lewiston.neighborhoods: Downtown Lewiston, Bates College area, Riverside, Tree Streets
lewiston.meetingHighlights: Twin Cities recovery serving Lewiston-Auburn; mill-town heritage; diverse French-speaking and English meetings.
lewiston.transitInfo: Citylink bus service; Auburn-Lewiston Municipal Airport (LEW); Turnpike access.

augusta.areaDescription: Augusta, the state capital, along the Kennebec River
augusta.neighborhoods: Downtown Augusta, Capitol area, Western Avenue corridor, Hallowell (nearby), Gardiner (nearby)
augusta.meetingHighlights: State capital recovery community with meetings near the State House and along the Kennebec River; fellowship shared with neighboring Hallowell and Gardiner; evening discussion and step-study groups.
augusta.transitInfo: Kennebec Explorer bus service; Augusta State Airport (AUG); I-95 and US-202 provide regional access.

bar-harbor.areaDescription: Bar Harbor and Mount Desert Island on the Downeast Maine coast
bar-harbor.neighborhoods: Downtown Bar Harbor, Cottage Street, Acadia National Park area, Northeast Harbor, Southwest Harbor
bar-harbor.meetingHighlights: Coastal resort-town recovery with year-round meetings that swell during summer tourist season; welcoming to visitors exploring Acadia National Park; church and community center groups in Bar Harbor and neighboring villages.
bar-harbor.transitInfo: Island Explorer free shuttle (seasonal, serving Acadia and MDI); Hancock County-Bar Harbor Airport (BHB); Route 3 connects to Ellsworth and I-95 via US-1A.

south-portland.areaDescription: Coastal city across the harbor from Portland
south-portland.neighborhoods: Mill Creek, Ferry Village, Knightville, Willard Beach, Cash Corner, Meetinghouse Hill
south-portland.meetingHighlights: Meetings serve the greater Portland area with convenient access from South Portland and Cape Elizabeth.
south-portland.transitInfo: Greater Portland Metro bus service and close proximity to Portland International Jetport support travel.

biddeford.areaDescription: Southern Maine mill city on the Saco River
biddeford.neighborhoods: Downtown, Main Street corridor, Biddeford Pool area, Five Points, UNE vicinity, South Street area
biddeford.meetingHighlights: Meetings serve Biddeford-Saco communities with regular neighborhood options and easy regional access.
biddeford.transitInfo: Biddeford-Saco-Old Orchard Beach Transit and nearby Amtrak Downeaster service improve connectivity.

waterville.areaDescription: Kennebec Valley city on the Kennebec River
waterville.neighborhoods: Downtown, Colby College area, North Street district, South End, Kennedy Memorial Drive corridor, Elm City area
waterville.meetingHighlights: Meetings serve central Maine residents with consistent local options in a regional service center.
waterville.transitInfo: Kennebec Explorer regional transit serves the area; I-95 provides the main highway connection.
